name: @sentzunhat/zacatl
description: A modular, high-performance TypeScript microservice framework for Node.js, featuring layered architecture, dependency injection, and robust validation for building scalable APIs and distributed systems.
author: Zacatl Contributors

scripts.build:scripts:esm: npx tsc -p scripts/tsconfig.scripts.esm.json && npx tsc-alias -p scripts/tsconfig.scripts.esm.json && npx tsx scripts/build/fix-esm.ts build-scripts-esm
scripts.build:scripts: npm run parallel -- "npm run build:scripts:esm,npm run build:scripts:cjs"
scripts.build:src:esm: npx tsc -p tsconfig.json && npx tsc-alias -p tsconfig.json && npx tsx scripts/build/fix-esm.ts build-src-esm
scripts.build:src:cjs: npx tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && npx tsc-alias -p tsconfig.cjs.json
scripts.build:src: npm run parallel -- "npm run build:src:esm,npm run build:src:cjs"
scripts.build: npm run build:src && npm run build:scripts
scripts.test:coverage: NODE_ENV=test ENV=test npx vitest run --coverage --reporter verbose --reporter json --outputFile.json=test-results.json && npm run update:readme-coverage
scripts.type:check: npm run parallel -- "npm run type:check:src,npm run type:check:test,npm run type:check:scripts"
scripts.lint: npm run parallel -- "npm run lint:src -- --debug,npm run lint:test -- --debug,npm run lint:scripts -- --debug"
scripts.lint:silent: npm run parallel -- "npm run lint:src,npm run lint:test,npm run lint:scripts"
scripts.lint:fix: npm run parallel -- "npm run lint:src:fix -- --debug,npm run lint:test:fix -- --debug,npm run lint:scripts:fix -- --debug"
scripts.lint:fix:silent: npm run parallel -- "npm run lint:src:fix,npm run lint:test:fix,npm run lint:scripts:fix"
scripts.clean:src: npx tsx scripts/clean/rm.ts src/**/*.js src/**/*.d.ts src/**/*.js.map src/**/*.d.ts.map
scripts.clean:build: npx tsx scripts/clean/rm.ts build-src-esm build-src-cjs build-scripts-esm build-scripts-cjs coverage publish
scripts.clean:examples: npx tsx scripts/clean/rm.ts examples/*/node_modules examples/*/backend/node_modules examples/*/frontend/node_modules examples/*/backend/dist examples/*/frontend/dist examples/*/dist
scripts.clean:all: npm run parallel -- "npm run clean:build,npm run clean:src,npm run clean:examples" && npm run clean:modules && npm run clean:gitignored
scripts.prepublish:only: npm i && npm run prepublish:guard && npm run barrels:verify && npm run clean:src && npm run test:coverage && npm run type:check && npm run lint:silent && npm run build
scripts.publish:latest: npm run prepublish:only && npm run prepare-publish && npm publish ./publish --access public --tag latest
scripts.publish:otp: npm run prepublish:only && npm run prepare-publish && npm publish ./publish --access public --tag latest --otp
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepublish:only && npm run prepare-publish && npm publish ./publish --dry-run
scripts.publish:dry:ci: npm run prepublish:guard && npm run barrels:verify && npm run clean:src && npm run test && npm run type:check && npm run lint:silent && npm run build && npm run prepare-publish && npm publish ./publish --dry-run
scripts.postbuild:esm: mkdir -p build-src-esm/eslint && cp -R src/eslint/* build-src-esm/eslint/ || true && mkdir -p build-src-esm/localization/locales && cp -R src/localization/locales/* build-src-esm/localization/locales/ || true
scripts.postbuild:cjs: mkdir -p build-src-cjs/eslint && cp -R src/eslint/* build-src-cjs/eslint/ || true && mkdir -p build-src-cjs/localization/locales && cp -R src/localization/locales/* build-src-cjs/localization/locales/ || true
scripts.postbuild: npm run parallel -- "npm run postbuild:esm,npm run postbuild:cjs"
scripts.setup:dev: npm ci && npm run check:peers && npm run barrels:generate
